response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced and versatile software engineer with over 15 years in the industry, including founding his own open-source project. His recent work with AI-agent infrastructure and broad technical skills across web, mobile, and cloud are valuable. However, his resume falls short of the Director-level seniority and deep AI strategy focus required for this Principal Engineer role. His experience is heavily weighted towards hands-on development and implementation rather than defining high-level technical strategy, and his direct AI experience appears very recent and not at the product-level expertise the role demands.
strengths: Extensive and broad technical experience (18+ years) across multiple domains including web, mobile, and embedded systems.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative by founding and maintaining the GISCollective open-source platform.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and tooling at re:cinq.
concerns: Lacks experience at the Principal or Director level; current and past roles are Staff/Senior developer.
Limited and very recent experience in AI, primarily focused on infrastructure rather than AI-powered product strategy.
Resume does not demonstrate experience in setting high-level technical strategy or advising strategic customers as required by the role.

key_factors.factor: Mismatch in Seniority and Strategic Scope
